title: epidendrum cereiflorum
intro: Epidendrum cereiflorum, also known as the Cereus Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its tall, columnar stems and white or pale yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum cereiflorum are said to include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, while also promoting digestive health and immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the roots and stems being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
